spec.name: submission_05_prediction_ensemble
spec.reasoning_summary: HIP-G submission #5. WEIGHTED prediction ensemble. weights [3,1,1,1] -> #1 (the class-balanced spectrogram champion) gets 0.5 of the vote, #2/#3/#4 each get ~0.167. The uniform 4-way average (run earlier) was AP-starved: #2/#3/#4 all collapse Arm Pain and 3-to-1 outvoted #1. Weighting #1 up protects AP while still letting #2-#4 (which are stronger on NP/HP) contribute. weights are normalized internally.
